questionHtml: State whether Annabelle’s conclusion is correct. Give a reason for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
0.97652>0.05   0.977>0.05                          R1

Annabelle’s conclusion is correct.                          A1


Note: Do not award R0A1. Answer must reference Annabelle’s conclusion; do not accept an answer, without context, of “fail to reject H0” for the A1 mark.

 

[2 marks]
